title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, rebuilt the insurance industry from scratch after securing a $108M Series A. They emphasize ambitious goal-setting and relentless execution despite regulatory challenges, achieving rapid growth and a defensible competitive moat through sustained effort over two years.
